description:
The substrate's identity-agent-migrations ladder has migrators for v0.1→v0.2, v0.4→v0.5, v0.5→v0.6 — but NOT for v0.6→v0.7 and NOT for v0.7→v0.8. With identity-schemas now landed at v0.7.0 (session 2026-04-XX prior session) AND v0.8.0 (session 2026-05-30 this session), the missing migrators are blocking the substrate-wide identity migration sweep (sibling bead substrate-wide-identity-migration-v0.6-to-v0.8).

Deliverable: two new packages under private/universal/substrate/collectives/schema-universal/private/universal/schema-migrators/identity-agent-migrations/:
  - v0.6.0-to-v0.7.0/spm/identity-agent-migrations-v000-006-000-to-v000-007-000/ — migrator that handles: schemaVersion bump 0.6→0.7, embedded PersonaRefs/SystemInstructionsRefs 0.6→0.7 tags, NoteModel 0.3→0.4 wire-key conversion (verbose to compact 'a'/'b'), persona.reveriesPath → persona.ikigai (full IkigaiModel struct), deferredMoves slot added (empty by default).
  - v0.7.0-to-v0.8.0/spm/identity-agent-migrations-v000-007-000-to-v000-008-000/ — migrator for whatever v0.7→v0.8 deltas exist (contributionMultipliers may now use typeRef LinkRefs via composition-schemas v0.2 consumption).

Follow the existing migrator pattern (no schema-universal deps; operates on JSON Dictionaries; deterministic transforms with round-trip tests). Reference the existing v0.5.0-to-v0.6.0 package as the template.

Reference: claude's hand uplift from v0.6→v0.7 in session 2026-05-30 (via repl-proof at agents/claude/memory/.docc/repl-proofs/2026-05-30-identity-v0_7_0-decode.swift) is the canonical example of the v0.6→v0.7 transformation. The migrator should encode that same transformation as a typed deterministic JSON-level transform.
resolution: RESOLVED 2026-05-31: both migrator packages authored, tested green, committed in schema-universal. v0.6→v0.7 migrator handles: schemaVersion bump, IdentityModel+PersonaRefs+SystemInstructionsRefs+Ikigai* discriminator bumps, NoteModel 0.3→0.4 wire-key reshape (author/blocks → a/b), persona.reveriesPath → persona.ikigai full IkigaiModel struct, deferredMoves: [] slot added. 7 tests green. v0.7→v0.8 migrator is version-bump-only across the IdentitySchemaVersion-aligned discriminator set (IdentityModel + PersonaRefs + Ikigai* + SystemInstructionsRefs + CLISpecExport + IdentityDeferredMoveModel); leaves unrelated version strings (LinkRefModel, NoteModel, SectionModel) untouched. 5 tests green. Both follow the contribution-migrations template (no schema-universal deps, JSON Dictionary transforms, idempotent). Sibling bead substrate-wide-identity-migration-v0.6-to-v0.8 (apply these migrators substrate-wide) is now UNBLOCKED.
title: Author identity-agent-migrations v0.6.0→v0.7.0 and v0.7.0→v0.8.0 migrator packages
